## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's style (`make lint` passes)
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] Added docstrings / comments for non-obvious logic
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if public-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials in the diff
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing API contracts (or documented if so)
